title: centaurea panormitana subsp. ucriae
intro: Centaurea panormitana subsp. ucriae, also known as Ucrine knapweed, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea panormitana subsp. ucriae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
